testcase.name: test_demo_property_loads_with_yield_opportunities

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa157bac3f80>('id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa157bac3f80> = {'analysis': {'action_plan': {'high_roi_renovations': [{'cost': 14500, 'difficulty': 'High', 'priority': 76, 'revenue_impact': 7200, ...}, {'cost': 22000, 'difficulty': 'High', 'priority': 71, 'revenue_impact': 9600, ...}], 'medium_upgrades': [{'cost': 2400, 'difficulty': 'Medium', 'priority': 88, 'revenue_impact': 3600, ...}, {'cost': 4200, 'difficulty': 'Medium', 'priority': 82, 'revenue_impact': 4800, ...}, {'cost': 3100, 'difficulty': 'Medium', 'priority': 64, 'revenue_impact': 1200, ...}], 'quick_wins': [{'cost': 800, 'difficulty': 'Low', 'priority': 92, 'revenue_impact': 2400, ...}, {'cost': 1200, 'difficulty': 'Low', 'priority': 86, 'revenue_impact': 1800, ...}, {'cost': 200, 'difficulty': 'Low', 'priority': 78, 'revenue_impact': 900, ...}]}, 'design_intelligence': {'color_palette': 'Limewash white, sun-bleached oak, charcoal stone — coherent with the Cycladic vernacular and aligned with current editorial expectations.', 'furnishing_cohesion': 'Fundamentally cohesive — limewash, oak and stone read as one material story; rattan accents fracture the line and should be retired.', 'furniture_quality': 'Mid-tier with selective elevation; swap rattan accents for hand-finished oa...tactile signal with visual restraint.', 'guest_emotional_perception': 'Arrival reads calm and contemplative; evening softens without programmed light — measurable risk to repeat-stay rates and review sentiment.', ...}, 'layout_intelligence': {'bedroom_privacy': 'Strong — separated wing with stone wall buffer.', 'circulation': 'Good; no choke points.', 'loft_opportunity': 'Vaulted ceiling above living area supports a discrete sleeping mezzanine for +1 sleep.', 'sleeps_per_sqm': '0.06 — slightly under-utilized for premium island STR.', ...}, 'market_intelligence': {'adr_range': '€110 – €240', 'competitors': '8 comparable boutique suites within 1.5km; only 3 execute at editorial design standard — defensible scarcity premium.', 'local_market_insights': 'Koufonisia attracts a low-volume, high-spend traveler cohort. Design-led inventory is structurally undersupplied versus Mykonos; peer-set sophistication is rising but absorbable.', 'neighborhood_intelligence': 'Chora sea-facing terrace district commands a 22–28% premium over inland inventory; foot traffic is curated, no near-term saturation risk identified.', ...}, ...}, 'bathrooms': 1, 'bedrooms': 1, 'city': 'Koufonisia, Greece', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter9.py:23: in test_demo_property_loads_with_yield_opportunities assert body.get("id") E AssertionError: assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa157bac3f80>('id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa157bac3f80> = {'analysis': {'action_plan': {'high_roi_renovations': [{'cost': 14500, 'difficulty': 'High', 'priority': 76, 'revenue_impact': 7200, ...}, {'cost': 22000, 'difficulty': 'High', 'priority': 71, 'revenue_impact': 9600, ...}], 'medium_upgrades': [{'cost': 2400, 'difficulty': 'Medium', 'priority': 88, 'revenue_impact': 3600, ...}, {'cost': 4200, 'difficulty': 'Medium', 'priority': 82, 'revenue_impact': 4800, ...}, {'cost': 3100, 'difficulty': 'Medium', 'priority': 64, 'revenue_impact': 1200, ...}], 'quick_wins': [{'cost': 800, 'difficulty': 'Low', 'priority': 92, 'revenue_impact': 2400, ...}, {'cost': 1200, 'difficulty': 'Low', 'priority': 86, 'revenue_impact': 1800, ...}, {'cost': 200, 'difficulty': 'Low', 'priority': 78, 'revenue_impact': 900, ...}]}, 'design_intelligence': {'color_palette': 'Limewash white, sun-bleached oak, charcoal stone — coherent with the Cycladic vernacular and aligned with current editorial expectations.', 'furnishing_cohesion': 'Fundamentally cohesive — limewash, oak and stone read as one material story; rattan accents fracture the line and should be retired.', 'furniture_quality': 'Mid-tier with selective elevation; swap rattan accents for hand-finished oa...tactile signal with visual restraint.', 'guest_emotional_perception': 'Arrival reads calm and contemplative; evening softens without programmed light — measurable risk to repeat-stay rates and review sentiment.', ...}, 'layout_intelligence': {'bedroom_privacy': 'Strong — separated wing with stone wall buffer.', 'circulation': 'Good; no choke points.', 'loft_opportunity': 'Vaulted ceiling above living area supports a discrete sleeping mezzanine for +1 sleep.', 'sleeps_per_sqm': '0.06 — slightly under-utilized for premium island STR.', ...}, 'market_intelligence': {'adr_range': '€110 – €240', 'competitors': '8 comparable boutique suites within 1.5km; only 3 execute at editorial design standard — defensible scarcity premium.', 'local_market_insights': 'Koufonisia attracts a low-volume, high-spend traveler cohort. Design-led inventory is structurally undersupplied versus Mykonos; peer-set sophistication is rising but absorbable.', 'neighborhood_intelligence': 'Chora sea-facing terrace district commands a 22–28% premium over inland inventory; foot traffic is curated, no near-term saturation risk identified.', ...}, ...}, 'bathrooms': 1, 'bedrooms': 1, 'city': 'Koufonisia, Greece', ...}.get
